title: datura hummatu var. fastuosa
intro: Datura hummatu var. fastuosa, commonly known as Jimsonweed or Datura, is a plant species in the nightshade family. The medicinal properties of Datura are found in its roots, leaves, and seeds, which contain alkaloids like scopolamine and hyoscyamine. These compounds have been used for centuries to treat various health conditions, including pain relief, anxiety, and insomnia, with benefits also including antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. Traditional herbal preparations include teas, tinctures, and infusions, although it's essential to note that Datura should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
